center.name: Point Calimere
center.summary: Point Calimere是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红翅凤头鹃，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Soc.|volume=52|issue=1|page=210| url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/48184060 }} In mid-October, they are found in numbers at Point Calimere, possibly into Sri Lanka
